name: copilot-dev-camp-cowork-plugin
description: Copilot Dev Camp plugin for Cowork - Research Microsoft Foundry, create presentations and documentation

scripts.package: PowerShell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path manifest.json, color.png, outline.png, skills -DestinationPath copilot-dev-camp.zip -Force; Write-Host 'Plugin packaged: copilot-dev-camp.zip'"
scripts.package:unix: zip -r copilot-dev-camp.zip manifest.json color.png outline.png skills/

author: Copilot Dev Camp
